libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 types from the tools.jackson namespace, e.g. import tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode. Do not add or use com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode to fix compilation; SchemaGenerator.generateSchema now returns tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode, so the old FasterXML type is incompatible. No Docker image, environment variable, or system property appears required.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 declares jsonschema-generator as provided, but meaningful tests must instantiate SchemaGenerator/SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder and pass Swagger2Module as documented.
The module reads Swagger Core 2.x @Schema and @ArraySchema annotations, but swagger-annotations is provided rather than transitively available; 2.2.41 is the version managed by the 5.0.0 parent.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.38.0 tests that import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode will fail javac against library version 5.0.0 until migrated to tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode.
Retaining older swagger-annotations may compile for common annotations, but the artifact's 5.0.0 dependency management uses 2.2.41; local Gradle verification remains authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The Swagger 2 module is not standalone: its POM declares both jsonschema-generator and swagger-annotations as provided, while normal usage creates a SchemaGenerator and passes Swagger2Module. Version 5.0.0 also migrated from FasterXML Jackson 2 to tools.jackson Jackson 3.
